lessons.note: The first sample supplier TC PDF is text-extractable and does not require OCR.
The output template contains merged cells; writes must resolve to the top-left cell of each merged range.
OCR support requires both Python packages and the separate Tesseract OCR application on the agent host.
LLM Playground extraction is optional and controlled by LLM_API_BASE_URL and LLM_API_KEY; parser/OCR fallback remains active if the API fails.

supplier_format_notes.note: Sample TC has chemical properties on page 1 and mechanical properties on page 2. Coil rows can be joined by heat number and coil number.
Image/scanned inputs are handled with OCR first, then the same header and line-item parser is applied to OCR text.

excel_mapping_notes.note: Rows 15-23 hold coil line items, so v1 supports up to 9 extracted line items per TC output file.

powerautomate_notes.note: Power Automate should trigger from Teams channel Supplier TC Agent and call /tc/process-base64 or /tc/process on the agent endpoint.

known_errors.error: winget reported successful Tesseract install, but tesseract.exe was not found on PATH, Program Files, user AppData, or uninstall registry checks afterward.
known_errors.next_action: Install or verify Tesseract OCR on the final agent host and set TESSERACT_CMD to the exact tesseract.exe path.
